name: carbon-icons-motion-crop-icon
title: Animated Crop Icon
author: Carbon Design System contributors
description: Moves opposing crop corners together and back to explain the crop action.

changes: Converted the upstream JavaScript component to strict TSX, removed its mirrored effect/ref wrapper, and renamed isAnimating to the controlled isAnimated prop.
Forwarded SVG props, preserved the upstream inline geometry, and made the title and inherited color accessible to consumers.
Converted the nested SCSS module to an equivalent flat CSS module.
Compacted the source-authored active keyframes into one non-looping 280 ms interaction and added prefers-reduced-motion handling.

provenance.geometry: Inline SVG geometry copied from the official Carbon Icons Motion component blob.

carbonBasis.statement: The upstream README says the package mirrors Carbon icons but is not tied to a specific Carbon version.

license.scope: src/components/Formatting/CropMotion/CropMotion.js, src/components/Formatting/CropMotion/crop--motion.module.scss, and their inline Carbon-derived SVG geometry

changes: Created locally because the pinned upstream commit contains no NOTICE file; records attribution and Apache modification marking.

modifications.change: Converted the upstream JavaScript component to strict TSX, removed its mirrored effect/ref wrapper, and renamed isAnimating to the controlled isAnimated prop. Forwarded SVG props, preserved the upstream inline geometry, and made the title and inherited color accessible to consumers.
modifications.reason: Expose a strict, controlled, portable React SVG component without changing its source geometry.

modifications.change: Converted the nested SCSS module to an equivalent flat CSS module. Compacted the source-authored active keyframes into one non-looping 280 ms interaction and added prefers-reduced-motion handling.
modifications.reason: Remove the Sass requirement, prevent looping/autoplay, meet the UI timing budget, and honor reduced motion.

rights.notice: Generic Carbon-system glyph; no product logo, company mark, or remote asset retained.
